name: gate-guarantee
title: Gate-guarantee: doctor verifies hooks + CI verifies freshness (gaps 1/4)
description: Close the safety gaps: doctor live-probes .git/hooks + .claude/settings.json + AGENTS/CLAUDE freshness + reads .install-state.json (trusted), reporting hook/freshness state it is currently blind to (hole 1). CI (render_workflow) runs codas agents --verify + wiki --verify so stale generated docs fail CI (hole 2). Surface trusted=unknown (hole 4 partial). Gate-adjacent (doctor pass/warn semantics + committed CI artifact) -> design review first.
creator: oydodo
